ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Somita Basu appeared by zoom for Jolaunda Johnson (petitioner).

The court raised the issue of whether it should require a bond. Mrs. Basu stated that she originally filed a petition with a will and then amended it to file intestate, and that one of the beneficiaries has a power of attorney and does not have the capacity to sign a waiver himself. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant. Jolaunda Johnson will be appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond will be set at $861,000.00. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration will be set for October 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein will be appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Somita Basu appeared by zoom for Jolaunda Johnson (petitioner).

Mrs. Basu stated that she believes the issue of the lost will has been addressed, that the relatives of the petitioner have signed declarations regarding their view that this is the uncle's actual will, that there is no spouse, that there are no children and there is not any evidence that the uncle destroyed the will. Mrs. Basu also stated that she believes that Mr. King is physically disabled. The court stated that there is not clear and convincing evidence to overcome the presumption of Probate Code 6124. The court also informed Mrs. Basu that direct notice of this proceeding needs to be given to Harold King. Mrs. Basu stated that if the court denies the will, she will proceed as an intestate probate. The Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 15, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
